shipRecommendationReason: The implementation and proof are ready for Sebastian review, but this PR changes the default desktop runtime path to WebSocket mode and is stacked on the ship/functional-labs v0.1.3 release gate. Ship only if Sebastian explicitly wants that runtime cutover and release gate now.
bugsFixedByCodexReview: Detached per-turn WebSocket runtime handlers after each send so stale handlers cannot process future turns or duplicate assistant/result events.
Stopped deriving duplicate-suppression chunk ids from assistant text so legitimate repeated chunks are not dropped.
Hardened WebSocket runtime transport shutdown so open clients cannot hang close().
Corrected runtime prompt context so transport_mode records the actual transport mode instead of the session mode.
Changed otto log targeting to choose the newest available log file and made the Electron shell dependency lazy for pure selector tests.
Made refresh orphan cleanup honor OTTO_WS_REMOTE_ENV instead of always using otto-byor.
Redacted token-like remote process output before surfacing runtime sync failures in UI status.
verification: bun test -> 271 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 926 expect calls
task staging -> pass, installed and launched /Applications/otto-staging.app
proofBoundary: The browser screenshots use a safe renderer preview and intentionally do not expose local Electron data or claim a live Letta connection. Native staging proof separately installed and launched the packaged staging app.
